recommendations.title: Henry V
recommendations.overview: In 1415, in the midst of the Hundred Years' War, the young King Henry V of England embarks on the conquest of France.

recommendations.title: The Prince and the Showgirl
recommendations.overview: An American showgirl becomes entangled in political intrigue when the Prince Regent of a foreign country attempts to seduce her.

recommendations.title: Hamlet
recommendations.overview: Winner of four Academy Awards, including Best Picture and Best Actor, Sir Laurence Olivier’s Hamlet continues to be the most compelling version of Shakespeare’s beloved tragedy. Olivier is at his most inspired—both as director and as the melancholy D

recommendations.title: The Round Up
recommendations.overview: A faithful retelling of the 1942 "Vel' d'Hiv Roundup" and the events surrounding it.

recommendations.title: The King
recommendations.overview: England, 15th century. Hal, a capricious prince who lives among the populace far from court, is forced by circumstances to reluctantly accept the throne and become Henry V.

recommendations.title: Queen Margot
recommendations.overview: Paris, Kingdom of France, August 18, 1572. To avoid the outbreak of a religious war, the Catholic princess Marguerite de Valois, sister of the feeble King Charles IX, marries the Huguenot King Henry III of Navarre.

recommendations.title: A Man for All Seasons
recommendations.overview: A depiction of the conflict between King Henry VIII of England and his Lord Chancellor, Sir Thomas More, who refuses to swear the Oath of Supremacy declaring Henry Supreme Head of the Church in England.

recommendations.title: Sleuth
recommendations.overview: A man who loves games and theatre invites his wife's lover to meet, setting up a battle of wits with potentially deadly results.

recommendations.title: They Shall Not Grow Old
recommendations.overview: A documentary about World War I with never-before-seen footage to commemorate the centennial of Armistice Day, and the end of the war.

recommendations.title: Battle for Sevastopol
recommendations.overview: The story of Lyudmila Pavlichenko, the most successful female sniper in history.
